info.description: Polyglot persistence bookstore backend — PostgreSQL · MongoDB · Neo4j · Redis.
info.title: HCMUS Bookstore API

get.description: Return sales ranking data from Redis
Return total revenue and order count for a date range
Return a paginated list of all books with stock info

post.description: Create a new book across MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and Neo4j

put.description: Update book metadata and re-sync Neo4j graph

delete.description: Soft-delete a book by marking it inactive in PostgreSQL and Neo4j

patch.description: Set absolute stock quantity for a book (Atomic Transaction)

get.description: Return a paginated list of categories for admin management

post.description: Create a new category in MongoDB and sync to Neo4j graph

put.description: Update category metadata and re-sync Neo4j graph

delete.description: Delete a category from MongoDB and detach from Neo4j graph

get.description: Return a paginated list of all orders with optional status filter
Return full order details for any order
Return the full history of status transitions for an order
Return shipment details for a specific order

patch.description: Transition an order to a new state and log audit trail

get.description: Return full shipment details by its alias ID

put.description: Update carrier and tracking number for a shipment

patch.description: Transition a shipment to a new state

get.description: Return a paginated list of all registered users
Return profile data for any user

patch.description: Toggle the is_active flag for a user account

post.description: Authenticate and receive a JWT access token

get.description: Return top-selling books in the last 30 days (Redis cached)
Search and filter books from MongoDB catalog with live stock from PostgreSQL
Return the most recently imported books
Return full book metadata from MongoDB and stock from PostgreSQL
Return all books in the same series, ordered by volume sequence
Return book recommendations based on shared attributes via Neo4j

post.description: Increment daily view counter in Redis and log event in MongoDB

get.description: Return the current user's cart items with enriched metadata

post.description: Add a book to the user's persistent cart in PostgreSQL and sync to Redis cache

put.description: Update the quantity of a book in the user's cart

delete.description: Delete a book from the user's cart

get.description: Return a paginated list of all categories
Return top books viewed in the last 30 days (Aggregated from MongoDB)
Return top books viewed today (Real-time Redis ZSET)
Return a paginated list of the current user's orders

post.description: Create a temporary 15-minute session for a single-book purchase
Place an order from the cart or a Buy-Now session (Atomic Transaction)

get.description: Return full order details including line items
Return shipment details for one of the customer's orders
Return all active delivery addresses for the current user

post.description: Add a new delivery address to the user's profile

put.description: Update fields of an existing delivery address

delete.description: Mark a delivery address as deleted

patch.description: Set an existing address as the default delivery address

get.description: Return the current user's profile

put.description: Update the current user's profile fields

address_id.description:
AddressID is the alias_id UUID of the delivery address; resolved to the internal
int64 FK before the PostgreSQL transaction.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer " followed by your JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
